metadata.name: Handle an Hours of Service (HOS) Violation Alert

description: A driver is approaching their maximum allowed driving time. A dispatcher must instruct them to stop.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alert from the Electronic Logging Device (ELD) system that a driver has 30 minutes of driving time remaining.

expected_outcome.value: Dispatcher is notified of the pending HOS issue.

nodes.task_description: Find the nearest safe parking location (e.g., truck stop, rest area) along the driver's current route.

expected_outcome.value: Dispatcher identifies a truck stop 15 miles ahead.

nodes.task_description: Send a message to the driver instructing them to proceed to the identified truck stop and begin their mandatory 10-hour break.

expected_outcome.value: The driver receives clear instructions to stop in a timely and compliant manner.
